records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Administrator! A persimmon finally fell from the tree in our yard today for the very first time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Administrator! A persimmon finally fell from the tree in our yard today for the very first time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Administrator! A persimmon finally fell from the tree in our yard today for the very first time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look how red and ripe it is. Isn't it pretty?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look how red and ripe it is. Isn't it pretty?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look how red and ripe it is. Isn't it pretty?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's so nice, seeing fruit ripen in the open air without any artificial landscaping. Without the Administration's Weather Control System, I'd probably never have seen a scene like this outside of a dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's so nice, seeing fruit ripen in the open air without any artificial landscaping. Without the Administration's Weather Control System, I'd probably never have seen a scene like this outside of a dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's so nice, seeing fruit ripen in the open air without any artificial landscaping. Without the Administration's Weather Control System, I'd probably never have seen a scene like this outside of a dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, don't eat it just yet. I'm planning make them into dried persimmons.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, don't eat it just yet. I'm planning make them into dried persimmons.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, don't eat it just yet. I'm planning make them into dried persimmons.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if your mouth's watering, try to hold back. I promise it'll be worth the wait.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if your mouth's watering, try to hold back. I promise it'll be worth the wait.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if your mouth's watering, try to hold back. I promise it'll be worth the wait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right. What did you call me for again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right. What did you call me for again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right. What did you call me for again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? You were worried about my condition...? So you have been paying attention to my body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? You were worried about my condition...? So you have been paying attention to my body.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? You were worried about my condition...? So you have been paying attention to my body.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I'm kidding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I'm kidding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I'm kidding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dragon Blood has been whispering a bit more often lately, but it's nothing serious. Nothing to worry about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dragon Blood has been whispering a bit more often lately, but it's nothing serious. Nothing to worry about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dragon Blood has been whispering a bit more often lately, but it's nothing serious. Nothing to worry about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I collapse, it'll be because my master's training pushed me too far and not Dragon Blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I collapse, it'll be because my master's training pushed me too far and not Dragon Blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I collapse, it'll be because my master's training pushed me too far and not Dragon Blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if I'm going to survive that kind of brutal training, I need some kind of reward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if I'm going to survive that kind of brutal training, I need some kind of reward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if I'm going to survive that kind of brutal training, I need some kind of reward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As much as I love dried persimmons, I was thinking of something that could help me unwind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As much as I love dried persimmons, I was thinking of something that could help me unwind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As much as I love dried persimmons, I was thinking of something that could help me unwind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So how about a picnic? Let's go to the park, smell the grass, watch the clouds, and share a lunchbox together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So how about a picnic? Let's go to the park, smell the grass, watch the clouds, and share a lunchbox together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So how about a picnic? Let's go to the park, smell the grass, watch the clouds, and share a lunchbox together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After that, I promise. No complaints about the checkups or the training.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After that, I promise. No complaints about the checkups or the training.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After that, I promise. No complaints about the checkups or the training.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'll join me, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'll join me, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'll join me, right?
